<section_header_level_1><loc_44><loc_200><loc_132><loc_208>4 Revision History</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_46><loc_209><loc_398><loc_216>NOTE: Page numbers for previous revisions may differ from page numbers in the current version.</text>
<otsl><loc_44><loc_220><loc_454><loc_268><fcel>Changes from Revision D (June 2016) to Revision E (May 2023)<fcel>Page<nl><fcel>· Updated the numbering format for tables, figures, and cross-references throughout the document ........... 1<ecel><nl><fcel>· Add the TPS563252 information ............................................................................................................... 1<ecel><nl><fcel>· Updated trademark information<fcel>1<nl><fcel>· Removed color from images throughout the document<fcel>1<nl></otsl>
<otsl><loc_44><loc_268><loc_454><loc_275><fcel>Changes from Revision C (August 2015) to Revision D (June 2016)<fcel>Page<nl></otsl>
<otsl><loc_44><loc_275><loc_454><loc_284><fcel>· Updated the Pinout image in Pin Configuration And Functions<fcel>4<nl><fcel>· Changed R$_{θJB}$ for TPS562200 From: 3.4 To: 13.4 in Thermal Information<fcel>6<nl></otsl>
<otsl><loc_44><loc_284><loc_454><loc_309><fcel>· Section 7.3.1, changed text From: "proportional to the converter input voltage, V$_{IN}$, and inversely proportional to the output voltage, V$_{O}$" To: "inversely proportional to the converter input voltage, V$_{IN}$, and proportional to the output voltage, V$_{O}$"........................................................................................................................... 13<nl></otsl>
<otsl><loc_44><loc_319><loc_454><loc_326><fcel>Changes from Revision B (July 2014) to Revision C (August 2015)<fcel>Page<nl></otsl>
<otsl><loc_44><loc_326><loc_454><loc_343><fcel>· Changed Features From: Integrated 122 mΩ and 72 mΩ FETs<fcel>12<nl><fcel>· Changed Features From: Integrated 68-mΩ and 39-mΩ FETs<fcel>12<nl><fcel>· Integrated 68-mΩ and 39-mΩ FETs<fcel>12<nl><fcel>· Added Section 1 : 650 kHz Switching Frequency<fcel>1<nl><fcel>· Changed Features From: Cycle-By-Cycle Hiccup Over-current Limit To: Cycle-By-Cycle Overcurrent Limit....<fcel>1<nl></otsl>
